title: Schnorr48 constant-time audit per draft-lichen-schnorr-00 §5.3
description: Research scalar mult, verify, comparison in Rust lichen-link and C schnorr48.c/Monocypher. Check for memcmp, vartime ops, secret-dependent branches. Report locations and fixes.
close_reason: Audit complete. Both impls compliant with constant-time requirements in spec section 5.3. Detailed locations and analysis reported. No code changes or fixes needed. Beads closed.
